ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tanks" (
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank */,
  "tank_name" TEXT /* Name of the tank */,
  "battles" TEXT /* Total number of battles fought with the tank */,
  "average_wr" TEXT /* Average win rate for the tank */,
  "player_wr_at_tier" TEXT /* Win rate of players using this tank at their respective tier */,
  "players" INTEGER /* Total number of players who have used this tank */,
  "battles_per_player" TEXT /* Average battles per player for this tank */,
  "tank_type" TEXT /* Type of the tank (e.g., Researchable) */,
  "tier" INTEGER /* Tier level of the tank */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the tank */,
  "firepower" INTEGER /* Firepower of the tank */,
  "armor" INTEGER /* Armor points of the tank */,
  "mobility" INTEGER /* Mobility rating of the tank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the game */,
  "total_battles" INTEGER /* Total number of battles played by the player */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the player */,
  "average_wr" TEXT /* Average win rate of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Player's region */,
  "language" TEXT /* Player's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank used in the battle */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who fought the battle */,
  "battle_result" TEXT /* Result of the battle (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date when the battle was fought */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the battle */,
  "battle_type" TEXT /* Type of battle (e.g., random, ranked) */,
  "map_name" TEXT /* Name of the map where the battle took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "win_rates" (
  "wr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each win rate entry */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the win rate record */,
  "win_rate" TEXT /* Recorded win rate for the tank on that date */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of battles used to calculate the win rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_win_rates_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tank_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tank type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the tank type (e.g., Researchable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tank type */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Whether the tank is premium or not */,
  "is_elite" INTEGER /* Whether the tank is an elite tank or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the progress record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank used */,
  "battles_fought" INTEGER /* Number of battles fought with this tank by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins with this tank by the player */,
  "average_wr" TEXT /* Average win rate with this tank by the player */,
  "current_tier" INTEGER /* Current tier level of the player with this tank */,
  "xp_to_next_tier" INTEGER /* Experience points needed to reach the next tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_progress_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tier record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tier_level" INTEGER /* Level of the tier the player is currently in */,
  "battles" INTEGER /* Total battles fought at this tier */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Total wins at this tier */,
  "win_rate" TEXT /* Win rate at this tier */,
  "tier_xp" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned at this tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tiers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player accessing the data */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the accessing player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the reward record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the reward */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank associated with the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., bonus points, special tank) */,
  "reward_value" TEXT /* Value of the reward */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the reward was awarded */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., claimed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tank_upgrades" (
  "upgrade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the upgrade record */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank that can be upgraded */,
  "upgrade_name" TEXT /* Name of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_type" TEXT /* Type of upgrade (e.g., firepower, armor) */,
  "upgrade_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the upgrade */,
  "upgrade_description" TEXT /* Description of the upgrade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upgrade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tank_upgrades_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tank_equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the equipment record */,
  "tank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tank that can be equipped */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment (e.g., gun, tracks) */,
  "equipment_cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the equipment */,
  "equipment_description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tank_equipment_tank_id FOREIGN KEY ("tank_id") REFERENCES tanks ("tank_id")
)
